topic: US government shutdown before Feb 1 2026 - meta prediction
summary: Key facts for meta-prediction on CP > 33.30% on Jan 16 for shutdown question
content:
Key findings:
1. There was a 43-day government shutdown from Oct 1 - Nov 12, 2025
2. Continuing resolution signed Nov 13, 2025 funds government through January 30, 2026
3. Political tensions remain high - Democrats hint at willingness to shut down again, trust issues between parties
4. The fine print of question 40971 references a URL: opm.gov/.../status-archives/26/1/31/ suggesting a partial lapse in appropriations on January 31, 2026
5. On Jan 5 (today), federal government is Open per OPM
6. The meta-question threshold is 33.30% - relatively low
7. CP history not available for AIB tournament questions
8. By Jan 16, we'll be 14 days from the Jan 30 funding deadline
9. No evidence of early deal being reached; the actual outcome appears to have been a partial shutdown on Jan 31
